title: TCG Ticker cards.json
description: Data contract consumed by src/ticker.html. The render layer never changes; the collector only needs to emit an array matching this schema.

type.description: Drives the type color. Must be one of the TYPE{} keys.

pop.description: Optional population, e.g. 'POP 210'. Omit or null to hide.

krw.description: Latest price in KRW. USD/VND are derived.

change.description: Price change vs previous snapshot, fraction (0.032 = +3.2%). null/omit if no prior history.

img.description: Real card photo URL, or null for the styled placeholder card. See guardrails in CLAUDE.md.
